faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know before onboarding your agency.

q1.question: Who is TravelOS for?
q1.answer: TravelOS is built for travel agencies, tour operators, and destination management companies that need a secure, multi-tenant platform for customers, packages, bookings, and payments.

q2.question: Does TravelOS support Arabic and RTL?
q2.answer: Yes. The interface supports English and Arabic with full right-to-left layout, including the marketing site and authenticated application.

q3.question: How does multi-tenant security work?
q3.answer: Each agency is isolated as a tenant. Row-level security in the database, JWT tenant claims, and role-based access control ensure users only see their organization's data.

q4.question: What does the AI Travel Assistant do?
q4.answer: The assistant helps convert customer inquiries into structured booking drafts. Staff always review and confirm — the system never auto-confirms bookings in the MVP.

q5.question: Can we migrate from spreadsheets or legacy tools?
q5.answer: Yes. During onboarding we help import customers and packages, configure roles, and train your team on the booking workflow.

q6.question: Is there a free trial?
q6.answer: Sign in to request access or start a guided trial. Enterprise plans include dedicated onboarding and custom terms.

cta.title: Ready to modernize your travel operations?
cta.subtitle: Join agencies running on a platform built for the industry — not adapted from generic software.

footer.blurb: The operating system for modern travel agencies, tour operators, and DMCs.

auth.passwordResetSuccess: Your password has been updated. Sign in with your new password.

customers.title: Customers
customers.tenantRequired: Your session has no tenant context. Sign out and sign in again, or enable the Custom Access Token hook in Supabase.
customers.formHint: Fields marked Required must be filled in. Optional fields can be left empty.
customers.emailHint: Use a valid address (letters, numbers, dot and underscore allowed before @).
customers.lastNameRequired: Last name is required for individual customers.
customers.companyNameRequired: Company name is required for corporate customers.

packages.title: Packages
packages.noItinerary: No itinerary days yet. Add at least one day before publishing.
packages.pricingHint: Set at least one tier (adult, child, or infant) before publishing.

packages.publishHint: Add at least one itinerary day and one pricing tier, then publish to make this package available for bookings.
packages.titleTooLong: Title must be 255 characters or less.

packages.pricingRequired: Add at least one pricing tier.
packages.publishNeedsItinerary: Add at least one itinerary day before publishing.
packages.publishNeedsPricing: Add at least one pricing tier before publishing.
packages.publishNeedsBoth: Add itinerary days and pricing before publishing.
packages.confirmDelete: Remove this package from active lists?

bookings.leadTravelerHint: First traveler is treated as the lead passenger.

bookingAgent.title: Booking Agent

bookingAgent.emptyState: Try: "Search packages to Istanbul under $2000" or "Status of BK-2026-000001"

bookingAgent.hitlNote: Drafts stay in draft status until you confirm in Bookings. The agent never auto-confirms.
